seoTitle: Burwood East vs Bushy Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Burwood East and Bushy Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Burwood East vs Bushy Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Burwood East and Bushy Park.
heading: Burwood East vs Bushy Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Burwood East, Victoria and Bushy Park, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Burwood East has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Bushy Park (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Burwood East or Bushy Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Burwood East has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Bushy Park scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Burwood East scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Bushy Park scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Burwood East or Bushy Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Burwood East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
